completed_tasks.name: Revert Schedule coupling in runDailyDigest, move cron to once-daily 09:00 ET
Switch digest bucket matching from rule.name to rule.systemType
Grey out DigestScheduleForm with tooltip explaining server-side override
Update urgent_uncertain_delete_risk memory to reflect narrowed scope

remaining_tasks.name: Confirm 09:00 ET arrival + non-zero Notifications section in next morning's digest

human_actions_pending.context: Verify both fixes in production after auto-deploy

decisions.decision: Drop fork-only Schedule advance reimplementation in runDailyDigest rather than re-debug
decisions.rationale: Minimize upstream divergence; single-user fork doesn't need per-account scheduling

decisions.decision: systemType-first bucket matching with name fallback for Urgent/Uncertain
decisions.rationale: Survive rule renames without adding new SystemType enum values (which would mean Prisma migration + further divergence)

decisions.decision: Grey out UI form with tooltip rather than hide it
decisions.rationale: Keeps upstream component intact; makes the server-side override visible and explainable

next_action: At ~09:05 ET on 2026-05-12 confirm digest arrival time and Notifications section content; if either fails, check inbox-zero-cron and inbox-zero-app docker logs.
context_notes: User explicitly drove the fix shape with 'the more we diverge, the harder it gets to merge'. Root cause of the underlying Prisma/pg-adapter no-op on Schedule update was never pinned down (updatedAt advanced but date columns stayed frozen) — now moot because that code path is gone. PR #22 squash-merged as 57fa0fe11; auto-deploy in progress.
